meaning: adj.杂色的,五颜六色的,穿染色衣的,混杂的n.杂色,杂色衣服,混杂,小丑
examples: The audience was a motley crew of students and tourists.
The room was filled with a motley collection of furniture and paintings.
The response came with such a thundergust from the motley crew that the crazy building vibrated to the sound.
He borrowed this feature from a motley assortment of electronics products dating to the early 1980s.
Daniel James of the Motley Fool is bullish on KKD, advising investors to buy now.
